vocab.example: Developing more communal spaces would foster a stronger sense of belonging among residents in this high-rise district.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống cây xanh đô thị
vocab.example: I believe the integration of more urban greenery is essential to mitigate the heat island effect in our neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: thân thiện với người đi bộ
vocab.example: The local council should focus on creating pedestrian-friendly zones where people can walk safely without the roar of traffic.
Public squares and parks serve as vital hubs that promote social cohesion by bringing diverse groups of people together.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất giải trí
vocab.example: There is a noticeable dearth of recreational facilities like public swimming pools or sports centers in my immediate vicinity.

vocab.meaning: nơi toàn bê tông cốt thép (thường dùng để chỉ trích đô thị hóa quá mức)
vocab.example: My area is becoming something of a concrete jungle, so a new botanical garden would be a breath of fresh air.
A multipurpose venue could host everything from weekend farmers' markets to outdoor cinema screenings.

vocab.meaning: được cắt tỉa/chăm sóc cẩn thận (vườn tược, công viên)
vocab.example: I would love to have a well-manicured park nearby where I could unwind after a taxing day at work.

vocab.meaning: niềm tự hào về địa phương/thành phố
vocab.example: Iconic public landmarks not only beautify the city but also instill a deep sense of civic pride in the inhabitants.

vocab.meaning: trong khoảng cách có thể đi bộ
vocab.example: Having a library or a community hub within walking distance would greatly enhance the quality of life for elderly residents.
